title: zanthoxylum dinklagei
intro: Zanthoxylum dinklagei, also known as the West African prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub or small tree that is native to West Africa and is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, thanks to its health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting digestion. Zanthoxylum dinklagei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are widely used in traditional medicine in West Africa.
